privileged_info_summary: The NoteKeeper Android project is located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NoteKeeper. The task requires localizing 15 string keys into Spanish and French. The English base strings are created with specific keys: app_name, title_home, title_notes, title_settings, action_add_note, action_delete, action_save, action_cancel, hint_note_title, hint_note_content, msg_note_saved, msg_note_deleted, msg_no_notes, dialog_delete_title, and dialog_delete_message. Verified Spanish translations for spot-checks are: title_home='Inicio', action_save='Guardar', msg_note_deleted='Nota eliminada'. Verified French translations for spot-checks are: title_home='Accueil', action_save='Enregistrer', msg_note_deleted='Note supprimée'. The project uses Android SDK 34 (target) and 24 (minimum), Gradle 8.4, Kotlin 1.9.22, and AGP 8.2.0.
